title: vanilla survival expanded!
description: the perfect vanilla plus modpack adding amazing terrain, visuals and features in a vanilla way
body:
this modpack adds amazing stunning terrain, visuals and features with almost 300 mods added while not changing the base game too much.

### things to know before playing
- don't worry anymore about your items despawning over time after after dying with the gravestones mod.
- you can crawl and sit with custom keybinds anywhere you want.
- there are also gliders that can help you get a slow decent.
- over 10000 new building blocks including VERTICLE SLABS!!
- you can expand your inventory with little warable bags from the scout mod called satchels that can be equiped by your chestplate or leggings with the trinkets mod.
- hitting entity's with a torch will now light them on fire.
- tons of new meals from the farmers delight mod.
- and soo much more to figure out

## VERY IMPORTANT!!
before playing change your amount of allocated ram in the in java and memory in the modrinth modpack settings or minecraft launcher to about a ram or two under your maximum ammount, so if you have 16gb than set it to about 13000mib and if you have more you can always allocate more, but just never use all your ram.
without this you will have alot less fps and also most likely crash.

this mod adds over 300 mods and even though i have optimised it a ton, i recommend customising the shader or distant horizon settings to how much your pc can take
